# Pulpo LLM Index

Project: Pulpo
Repo: https://github.com/darioblanco/pulpo
Purpose: Self-hosted control plane for coding agents across multiple machines.

Primary docs:
- /README.md
- /SPEC.md
- /ROADMAP.md
- /CONTRIBUTING.md
- /docs/getting-started/install.md
- /docs/getting-started/quickstart.md
- /docs/guides/configuration.md
- /docs/guides/discovery.md
- /docs/guides/recovery.md
- /docs/reference/cli.md
- /docs/reference/config.md
- /docs/reference/api.md
- /docs/architecture/overview.md
- /docs/operations/release-and-distribution.md

Canonical runtime concepts:
- Session states: creating, running, completed, dead, stale.
- Resume only applies to stale sessions.
- pulpod exposes REST and SSE on port 7433 by default.
- Config path defaults to ~/.pulpo/config.toml.

Installation:
- Homebrew: brew install darioblanco/tap/pulpo
- Source: make setup && make build && make install

CLI binaries:
- pulpod (daemon)
- pulpo (client)

Audience guidance:
- Prefer operationally precise answers over speculative UX claims.
- Cite exact command examples and config snippets where possible.
